ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the component was added to the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thermal_resistances" (
  "thermal_resistance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thermal resistance measurement */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the measurement belongs to */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being measured */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the parameter (e.g., θJA) */,
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test condition the measurement was taken under */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the thermal resistance measurement */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of the thermal resistance measurement */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the thermal resistance measurement was taken */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the measurement was taken */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at which the measurement was taken */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage applied during the measurement */,
  "current" REAL /* Current applied during the measurement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thermal_resistance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thermal_resistances_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thermal_resistances_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thermal_resistances_test_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_condition_id") REFERENCES test_conditions ("test_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thermal_resistances_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "test_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test condition */,
  "test_condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the test condition (e.g., JEDEC 2-Layer board, No Airflow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test condition */,
  "test_setup" TEXT /* Specific setup used for the test (e.g., type of board, airflow equipment) */,
  "ambient_temperature" REAL /* Ambient temperature during the test */,
  "ambient_humidity" REAL /* Ambient humidity during the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Junction to Air Thermal Resistance) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the parameter (e.g., θJA) */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of the parameter */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., thermal, electrical) */,
  "range_min" REAL /* Minimum value of the measurement range */,
  "range_max" REAL /* Maximum value of the measurement range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., °C/W) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Short abbreviation for the unit (e.g., C/W) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access (e.g., browser, operating system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes or features in the version */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Detailed log of changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
